chunks.title: Promise to Jacob and Israel
chunks.reason: Yahweh addresses Jacob directly with promises of the Spirit and declares His uniqueness as the First and Last.

chunks.title: Folly of Idol Makers
chunks.reason: A satirical argument describing how craftsmen make idols from wood and fire, highlighting their lack of insight.

chunks.title: Call to Remember and Rejoice
chunks.reason: Yahweh urges Jacob to remember his redemption and calls all creation to shout for joy.

chunks.title: Yahweh as Creator and Cyrus as Shepherd
chunks.reason: An oracle declaring Yahweh's sovereignty over creation and His specific plan to use Cyrus for Jerusalem's restoration.
